title: rhodoxylon scoparium
intro: Rhodoxylon scoparium, also known as Red Stag's Horn Moss, is a rare and endangered species of lichen. It has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high content of iodine and other nutrients, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rhodoxylon scoparium include its potential to stimulate the thyroid gland, improve skin and hair health, and aid in the treatment of goiter and other iodine-deficiency related disorders. Herbal preparations of Rhodoxylon scoparium typically involve drying and grinding the lichen into a powder, which can then be used as a supplement or added to teas and tinctures.
